description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and white marble-like stripes running parallel across its length. The stripes are evenly spaced and create a visually striking, high-contrast pattern reminiscent of modern urban design elements. The sides of the block are solid black, providing a stark contrast to the patterned top. The block appears dense and heavy, likely constructed from solid stone or concrete with a decorative marble finish on the upper surface. Its proportions suggest it could serve as a barrier or boundary marker in public spaces, such as plazas, sidewalks, or parks. The overall finish is smooth with a slight sheen, indicating a polished surface treatment.
description: A rectangular stone block with a black and white striped marble-patterned top and solid black sides, featuring a smooth, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal black and white stripes running across the top surface, with solid black sides visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of the stripes and the depth of the block, with the black sides prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the horizontal striped pattern across the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical stripes and solid black sides, mirroring view 1.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no signs of erosion or aging.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned as part of a row of similar blocks
